proposals.label: AI-Intensified Democratic Power Ambivalence
proposals.description:
A situation concept that examines how AI data collection and processing can simultaneously strengthen democratic participation and expand anti-democratic losses of control_human_agency.
Encompasses: accelerationist interpretation of data-rich civic systems as governance_adaptive capacity, safetyist interpretation of surveillance-enabled power lock-in as speculative_future_harm, and skeptic interpretation of platform data extraction as documented_present_harm to autonomy_individual.
Excludes: authoritarian-informationalism nodes focused only on repression, federal-state rule allocation, or general governance_oversight authority debates.
proposals.rationale: The unmapped concept appears in 2 document summaries with frequency 2. Nearest-node similarity data were not supplied; comparison against cc-026, cc-042, and sit-118 shows those nodes cover authoritarian information control, algorithmic power nexus formation, or AI-policy framing rather than the Janus-faced democratic affordance and threat created by AI-scale data processing.
